subject: Oscar Rascon Duarte
summary: Oscar Rascon Duarte, 58, of Mexico, died September 8, 2025 at Banner Desert Medical Center in Mesa, AZ after 8 months in ICE custody. Had late-stage Alzheimer's, kidney cancer, and hepatitis C at time of ICE transfer. Died from multi-organ failure. Questions about appropriateness of detaining terminally ill patient rather than humanitarian release.

key_facts.location: Banner Desert Medical Center, Mesa, Arizona
key_facts.cause_of_death: Under investigation - multi-organ failure, bladder infection, lung issues
key_facts.terminal_conditions: Late-stage Alzheimer's disease, kidney cancer, hepatitis C
key_facts.detention_facility: Promise Hospital (long-term acute care), Mesa, AZ
key_facts.investigation_status: Under investigation, no report released as of February 2026
